title: JUJUTSU KAISEN
overview: Yuji Itadori is a boy with tremendous physical strength, though he lives a completely ordinary high school life. One day, to save a classmate who has been attacked by curses, he eats the finger of Ryomen Sukuna, taking the curse into his own soul. From then on, he shares one body with Ryomen Sukuna. Guided by the most powerful of sorcerers, Satoru Gojo, Itadori is admitted to Tokyo Jujutsu High School, an organization that fights the curses... and thus begins the heroic tale of a boy who became a curse to exorcise a curse, a life from which he could never turn back.

episodes.episodeDescription: Yuji Itadori joins his school's Occult Club to avoid the track team. When cursed spirits attack his friends, he swallows a cursed object to save them .
Yuji meets Fushiguro, a jujutsu sorcerer who reveals the truth about the cursed object. Yuji decides to join Jujutsu High to help people .
Yuji begins training at Jujutsu High and meets his classmate Nobara Kugisaki. Together they face their first mission as a team .
The three first-year students are sent to rescue inmates from a detention center haunted by a Cursed Womb .
The mission takes a deadly turn as the Cursed Womb proves to be far more dangerous than anticipated. Yuji faces an impossible choice .
In the aftermath of the detention center incident, Yuji comes to terms with his sacrifice. Gojo reveals unexpected news about Yuji's condition .
Yuji returns to Jujutsu High and begins intensive training with Gojo. He learns to control the power of Sukuna within him .
A special grade cursed spirit named Jogo confronts Gojo. The overwhelming power difference between them becomes clear .
Yuji teams up with Grade 1 sorcerer Nanami to investigate mysterious deaths at a movie theater. They encounter a cursed spirit manipulating humans .
Junpei Yoshino meets Mahito, who teaches him about curses. Yuji tries to connect with Junpei while Nanami closes in on the threat .
Nanami battles the curse manipulating Junpei. Yuji confronts Junpei about his choices and the truth about Mahito .
Yuji tries to reach what remains of Junpei's heart. The emotional confrontation with Mahito leads to a devastating outcome .
Yuji and Nanami join forces to battle Mahito. Gojo arrives to turn the tide of the fight with his overwhelming power .

episodes.episodeTitle: Kyoto Sister School Goodwill Event - Team Battle, Part 0
episodes.episodeDescription: Yuji reveals he is alive to his fellow students. The Tokyo and Kyoto schools prepare for the goodwill exchange event .

episodes.episodeTitle: Kyoto Sister School Exchange Event - Group Battle 1
episodes.episodeDescription: The group battle begins between Tokyo and Kyoto students. Yuji faces opposition from the Kyoto school who want him eliminated .

episodes.episodeTitle: Kyoto Sister School Exchange Event - Group Battle 2
episodes.episodeDescription: The battle intensifies as students from both schools clash. Maki and Mai confront their complicated sister relationship .

episodes.episodeTitle: Kyoto Sister School Exchange Event - Group Battle 3
episodes.episodeDescription: Maki faces off against Miwa in an intense battle. The Kyoto students' true mission to eliminate Yuji is revealed .
Gojo confronts the special grade curses who infiltrated the event. His power leaves both allies and enemies in awe .
Yuji achieves the legendary Black Flash technique during his battle. His growth as a sorcerer impresses even Gojo .
The goodwill event concludes with unexpected results. Todo befriends Yuji and promises to help him grow stronger .
The event ends with a lighthearted baseball game between the schools. Students bond and prepare for future missions .
Yuji, Megumi, and Nobara investigate deaths connected to cursed paintings. They face the Death Painting curses Eso and Kechizu .
The battle against the Death Paintings continues. Megumi uses a new technique while Yuji and Nobara fight their respective foes .
The Death Painting Arc concludes with Yuji forming an unexpected alliance. The team prepares for their next mission as Season 1 ends .
